content.json:
Palo Alto Networks overview
Workbook Version: v2.9 | Last Updated: 2026-06-17

## ℹ️ Parser Function Requirement

**Workbook Version:** v2.9  
**Workbook Last Updated:** 2026-06-17  
**Parser Version:** v2.15  
**Parser Last Updated:** 2026-06-17

### Change Log
- v2.9 | 2026-06-17 | Optimized timechart queries by replacing raw TimeGenerated grouping with TimeRange-aligned bin_at() aggregation to reduce render cost.
- v2.8 | 2026-06-17 | Reduced workbook load-time cost by simplifying parameter and summary tile queries (removed join+make-series startup patterns).
- v2.7 | 2026-06-17 | Added low-cost type token prefilter before regex extraction to reduce base scan CPU.
- v2.6 | 2026-06-17 | Removed explicit function time parameters/filter so workbook and Logs use the selected UI TimeRange.
- v2.4 | 2026-06-17 | Reworked parser internals from nested callables to tabular let sections to resolve callable-expression errors in Sentinel Logs.
- v2.3 | 2026-06-17 | Fixed callable-union invocation by explicitly invoking all parser sub-functions.
- v2.2 | 2026-06-17 | Added TimeRange-parameterized parser calls in workbook queries; parser now uses early time pruning and no materialize/global sort.
- v2.1 | 2026-06-12 | Initial customer workbook/parser baseline for PAN-OS 11.x/12.x fields.

This workbook requires the **`PaloAlto_Syslog`** workspace function to be deployed in your Microsoft Sentinel workspace before any data will appear.

---

### Deploying the Parser Function

1. Open **Microsoft Sentinel** → **Logs**
2. Paste the function body from `PaloAlto_Syslog.function.kql` into Function Body
3. Click **Save as function**
4. Set the **Function name** to exactly: `PaloAlto_Syslog`
5. (Optional) Set a description, then click **Save**

---

### What the Parser Does

The `PaloAlto_Syslog` function reads from Sentinel `Syslog` (facility: **user**) and parses active PAN-OS log types in this deployment (TRAFFIC, THREAT, SYSTEM, CONFIG) into a structured schema.

### Prerequisites

- PAN-OS syslog forwarding configured to send to the Log Analytics workspace (facility: **user**)
- Syslog messages must use PAN-OS RFC 5424 style records (starting with `1,20`)
- The `PaloAlto_Syslog` function must be saved as a **workspace function** in Sentinel Logs

parameters.name: Source_IP
parameters.label: Source IP
parameters.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where isnotempty(SourceAddress)
| summarize Count = count() by SourceAddress
| top 200 by Count desc
| project Value = SourceAddress, Label = strcat(SourceAddress, " - ", round(Count/1000.0, 2), "k"), Selected = false

parameters.name: Destination_IP
parameters.label: Destination IP
parameters.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where isnotempty(DestinationAddress)
| summarize Count = count() by DestinationAddress
| top 200 by Count desc
| project Value = DestinationAddress, Label = strcat(DestinationAddress, " - ", round(Count/1000.0, 2), "k"), Selected = false

parameters.name: EventClass
parameters.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| extend EventClass = coalesce(Subtype, ThreatContentType)
| where isnotempty(EventClass)
| summarize Count = count() by EventClass
| top 200 by Count desc
| project Value = EventClass, Label = EventClass, Selected = false

content.query:
let data = PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP})
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where "{EventClass:label}" == "All" or coalesce(Subtype, ThreatContentType) in ({EventClass});
data
| summarize Count = count() by Type
| extend Activitys = Type, Trend = dynamic([])
| union (data
| summarize Count = count()
| extend Type = 'All', Activitys = '*', Trend = dynamic([]))
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Activities, by volume

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP})
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where "{EventClass:label}" == "All" or coalesce(Subtype, ThreatContentType) in ({EventClass})
| where '{activities}' == "All" or Type == '{activities}'
| summarize LogVolume=count() by coalesce(Subtype, ThreatContentType), bin_at(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}, {TimeRange:start})
content.title: Event trend, by time

content.query:
//trend by sevearity
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where "{EventClass:label}" == "All" or coalesce(Subtype, ThreatContentType) in ({EventClass})
| where '{activities}' == "All" or Type == '{activities}'
| summarize count() by bin_at(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain},{TimeRange:start}), SeverityLevel
content.title: Events severity, by time

content.query:
let data = PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ "TRAFFIC"
| extend EventClass = coalesce(Subtype, ThreatContentType);
data
| summarize Count = count() by EventClass
| extend DeviceEventClassIDs = EventClass, Trend = dynamic([])
| union (data
| summarize Count = count()
| extend EventClass = 'All', DeviceEventClassIDs = '*', Trend = dynamic([]))
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Device events Id summary - click to filter the graph below

content.query:
let data = PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ "TRAFFIC";
data
| summarize Count = count() by Action
| extend Actions = Action, Trend = dynamic([])
| union (data
| summarize Count = count()
| extend Action = 'All', Actions = '*', Trend = dynamic([]))
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Device action summary - click to filter the graph below

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'TRAFFIC'
| where '{EventClass}' == "All" or coalesce(Subtype, ThreatContentType)=='{EventClass}'
| summarize EventCount= count() by Action, bin_at(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}, {TimeRange:start})
content.title: Device action, by time

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where '{DeviceAction}' == "All" or Action=='{DeviceAction}'
| where Type =~ "TRAFFIC"
| summarize EventCount= count() by coalesce(Subtype, ThreatContentType), bin_at(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}, {TimeRange:start})
content.title: Device events Id, by time

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'TRAFFIC' 
| where Subtype =~ 'end' 
| extend Reason = SessionEndReason
| summarize ReasonCount= count() by Reason, bin_at(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}, {TimeRange:start})
content.title: Reasons for session ending, by time

content.query:
// Data sent outbound vs inbound
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'TRAFFIC'
| extend Direction=iff(SourceZone=~'Trust','Outbound' ,'Inbound' )
| summarize DataSentOutBoundMB=sumif(BytesSent, Direction=~'Outbound')/1048576, DataRecievedInboundMB=sumif(BytesReceived, Direction=~'Inbound')/1048576 by bin_at(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}, {TimeRange:start})
content.title: Sent and received data, by volume

items.name: Sent and received data by volume

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| where Action contains 'block'
| summarize ProtocolCount=count()  by Application
| top 5 by ProtocolCount desc
content.title: Top 5 blocked URLs, by application protocol

items.name: Top 5 blocked URLs by application protocol

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| where Action in ('block-url', 'block-continue')
| summarize CategoryCount=count() by Category
| project-rename CategoryName= Category
| top 5 by CategoryCount
content.title: Top 5 URL blocked, by category

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| where Action in ('block-url', 'block-continue')
| summarize URLCount=count() by URLFilename
| top 5 by URLCount desc
content.title: Top 5 blocked URLs

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| summarize ProtocolCount=count() by Application
| top 5 by ProtocolCount desc
content.title: Top 5 URLs, by application protocols

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| where Action in ('alert', 'continue')
| summarize URLCount=count() by URLFilename
| top 5 by URLCount desc
content.title: Top 5 allowed URLs

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| summarize ActionCount=count() by Action
content.title: URL threat event summary

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| where Action contains 'block'
| extend PAReferer = Referer
| where PAReferer !=''
| summarize RefererCount= count() by PAReferer
| top 5 by RefererCount desc
content.title: Top 5 referrers for blocked URLs

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| where Action in ('alert', 'continue')
| summarize CategoryCount=count() by Category
| project-rename CategoryName= Category
| top 5 by CategoryCount desc
content.title: Top 5 allowed URLs, by category

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| where Action !contains 'block'
| summarize ProtocolCount=count()  by Application
| top 5 by ProtocolCount desc
content.title: Top 5 allowed URLs, by application protocol

items.name: Top 5 allowed URLs by application protocol

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| summarize ActionCount=count() by Action, bin_at(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}, {TimeRange:start})
content.title: Web filter ativity, by time

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'url'
| where Action in ('alert', 'continue')
| summarize IPCount=count() by SourceAddress
| top 5 by IPCount  desc
content.title: Top 5 allowed web traffic source IP addresses

items.name: Top 5 allowed web traffic source IP addresses

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'wildfire'
| summarize ActionCount=count() by Action, bin_at(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}, {TimeRange:start})
content.title: Wildfire events, by time

content.query:
let data = PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'wildfire'
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP});
data
| summarize Count = count() by Action
| extend Actions = Action, Trend = dynamic([])
| union (data
| summarize Count = count()
| extend Action = 'All', Actions = '*', Trend = dynamic([]))
| project Action, Count, Trend
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 5 Wildfire activities

content.query:
let data = PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'wildfire'
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP});
data
| summarize Count = count() by Category
| extend Categorys = Category, Trend = dynamic([])
| union (data
| summarize Count = count()
| extend Category = 'All', Categorys = '*', Trend = dynamic([]))
| project Category, Count, Trend
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 5 Wildfire verdicts

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'wildfire'
| where '{DeviceAction}' == "All" or Action=='{DeviceAction}'
| where '{DeviceString}' == "All" or Category=='{DeviceString}'
| project TimeGenerated, GeneratedTime, SeverityLevel, Action, ['URL Category'] = Category, DestinationPort, DestinationAddress, ThreatID, SourcePort, SourceAddress, DestinationUser, URLFilename
content.title: Wildfire events

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'file'
| where Action contains 'deny'
| summarize ProtocolCount=count()  by Application
| top 5 by ProtocolCount desc
content.title: Top 5 denied files, by application protocol

items.name: Top 5 denied files by application protocol

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'file'
| where Action !contains 'deny'
| summarize ProtocolCount=count()  by Application
| top 5 by ProtocolCount desc
content.title: Top 5 allowed files, by application protocol

items.name: Top 5 allowed files by application protocol

content.query:
//Palo Alto File Category By Action Summary
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'file' 
| extend PACategory = Category
| summarize CategoryCount=count() by PACategory
| sort by CategoryCount
content.title: Summary of Palo Alto file categories, by activity

items.name: Summary of Palo Alto file categories by activity

content.query:
let data = PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'file'
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP});
data
| summarize Count = count() by Action
| extend Actions = Action, Trend = dynamic([])
| union (data
| summarize Count = count()
| extend Action = 'All', Actions = '*', Trend = dynamic([]))
| project Action, Count, Trend
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Summary of file type activities

content.query:
PaloAlto_Syslog()
| where Type =~ 'THREAT'
| where ThreatContentType =~ 'file'
| where "{Destination_IP:label}"=="All" or DestinationAddress in ({Destination_IP}) 
| where "{Source_IP:label}" == "All" or SourceAddress in ({Source_IP})
| where '{SelectedDA}' == "All" or Action == '{SelectedDA}'
| summarize ActionCount=count() by Action, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
content.title: Compare allowed and denied files, by time

items.name: Compare allowed and denied files by time
